title: HTI Toys Classic Collection Deluxe Dominoes Game
features: Each domino block is made of wood and numbered on a standard system, marked blank or with 1-6 recessed dots on both ends as is typical in a classic double-six table game.

This domino set can be played both indoors and outdoors and is complete with a convenient storage case made of natural wood, protecting the tiles from wear and tear and making it easy to travel anywhere!
This classic table game provides hours of fun for the entire family, both kids and adults!
Bring to your next family game night, weekend barbecue, or for rainy-day fun indoors!
This 28-piece block set is suitable for 2-4 players.
description: Product Description HTI Toys Classic Collection Deluxe Dominoes Game Each domino block is made of wood and numbered on a standard system, marked blank or with 1-6 recessed dots on both ends as is typical in a classic double-six table game. This domino set can be played both indoors and outdoors and is complete with a convenient storage case made of natural wood, protecting the tiles from wear and tear and making it easy to travel anywhere! This classic table game provides hours of fun for the entire family, both kids and adults! Bring to your next family game night, weekend barbecue, or for rainy-day fun indoors! Every number combo is included from 0/0 to 6/6, perfect for traditional dominoes games. PRODUCT DETAILS – This 28-piece block set is suitable for 2-4 players. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes.
